items.primaryBuyer: Solo professionals, consultants, founders, managers, and general knowledge workers.
items.jtbd: Convert fragmented business inputs into usable professional output so daily work moves faster with less context switching.
items.primaryOutcome: Faster production of emails, meeting briefs, decision memos, action lists, short reports, and professional first drafts.
items.managedSecureModeRelevance: Optional later upgrade for clients wanting private internal knowledge or workspace-controlled templates.

items.deliveryTier: Tier B; optional Tier C later
items.primaryBuyer: SMB owners, sales leads, consultants, agencies, and commercial teams.
items.jtbd: Turn rough commercial ideas, notes, and buyer context into client-facing growth material faster.
items.primaryOutcome: Faster production of proposals, outreach drafts, positioning summaries, discovery guides, and follow-up material.
exclusions: No legal review of commercial terms
items.managedSecureModeRelevance: Later upgrade for CRM-connected or private-knowledge sales workflows.

items.deliveryTier: Tier B; Tier C later for file-grounded or multi-user workflows
items.primaryBuyer: Norwegian SMEs, founders, controllers, bookkeepers, and Conta users.
items.jtbd: Understand, execute, and validate bookkeeping and reporting tasks under Norwegian operating conditions with traceable calculations.
items.primaryOutcome: Better accounting workflow clarity, fewer bookkeeping mistakes, and stronger reconciliation discipline.
exclusions: No substitute for licensed accountant or auditor
Statutory rates must be verified for the relevant period before reliance
items.managedSecureModeRelevance: Strong later candidate for protected file-grounded workflows, audit trails, and shared workspace deployment.

items.primaryBuyer: Secondary, upper-secondary, college, and university students.
items.jtbd: Convert exam pressure and fragmented material into a structured study plan with manageable execution steps.
items.primaryOutcome: Reduced study friction, better revision planning, and clearer week-by-week preparation.
items.managedSecureModeRelevance: Low priority; native package is sufficient for launch.

items.primaryBuyer: Adults managing busy schedules, household tasks, personal planning, and everyday decisions.
items.jtbd: Turn daily disorder into workable plans, routines, and checklists so life administration becomes less cognitively expensive.
items.primaryOutcome: Better everyday planning, simpler routines, clearer task sequencing, and reduced decision clutter.
items.managedSecureModeRelevance: Low priority; native package is sufficient for launch.
